'''鈭歝h-s-t-z''' ('''kachastezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xeriscape|xeriscape]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xeriscape|xeriscape]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-s-t-z
|-
! Lemma
| kachastezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichastezoko|thichastezoko]] || [[word:jichastezoko|jichastezoko]] || [[word:shichastezoko|shichastezoko]] || [[word:kichastezoko|kichastezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchastezoko|thuthuchastezoko]] || [[word:jujuchastezoko|jujuchastezoko]] || [[word:shushuchastezoko|shushuchastezoko]] || [[word:kukuchastezoko|kukuchastezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachastezoko|thachastezoko]] || [[word:jachastezoko|jachastezoko]] || [[word:shachastezoko|shachastezoko]] || [[word:kachastezoko|kachastezoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
